name: HCID Industrial Thesis: Design Systems for Usability Optimization
description: End-to-end UCD redesign of a CMMS mobile application in a industrial research environment (30 ECTS Master's Thesis). Developed through user research, Figma prototyping, and usability testing, achieving 'Good Usability' (SUS score 72).

name: VR Interaction Design: Immersive UX
description: Redesign of Virtual Reality user interfaces for vehicle assembly line training. Focused on reducing cognitive load and improving usability by creating intuitive, integrated interaction systems, resulting in a 94% positive user survey feedback.

name: Industrial Design Engineering: Bluetooth Speaker Prototype
description: Physical product development project: from acoustic research and conceptual sketching to an early foam model to validate ergonomics, 3D modeling, and final physical prototyping and studio photography.
